## Summary
Tea is a hot beverage made by steeping the leaves of the tea plant in hot water.

## Body
Tea is among the most widely consumed hot drinks. It is prepared by infusing dried
leaves in near-boiling water, and is served plain or with milk. This is **synthetic
fixture content** for the Model & Retrieval Substrate contract — it names no real person,
place, or organisation.
